PostToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$input = $Input | Out-String; if ($input -match '(?i)Start-BambooHRUserProvisioning\.ps1') { $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./tests/ -PassThru -Output None; if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { Write-Host ('Pester: {0} failed / {1} passed' -f $r.FailedCount, $r.PassedCount); exit 2 } else { Write-Host ('Pester: all {0} tests passed' -f $r.PassedCount) } }"
